scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:client: cd client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.build:server: cd server && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push
